title: YQL Organza Bags Small,100PCS 8X10cm White Meshbags Drawstring Little Net Bags for Gifts Jewelry Wedding Favour Christmas party favours, Small Giftbags for Jewellery
features: SHEER ORGANZA - These small organza bags are made of high quality sheer organza, which are very durable, touch softly and smoothly. Sheer gift pouches do not look tacky and actually make very cute packaging bags or gift bags

ORGANZA WEDDING FAVOUR BAGS SIZE - 3.15 x 4inches ( 8*10cm ). Package includes 100pcs of white organza bags. They fit small items well, great for party, wedding, company, church, hotels, stores to wrap favor gifts

PERFECT SMALL NET GIFT BAGS IN LIFE - Small organza bags drawstring are perfect for storing coins, cosmetics, mirrors, watches, earrings, bracelets, necklace. It’s also good for making sachets to create an unstoppable smell for cars and houses

WIDE APPLICABLE RANGE - The mesh bags small are great for protecting fruits and flowers. They are simple tools to protect your fruits (such as figs, tomatoes, blueberries, strawberries and other garden fruits and vegetables) from insects, birds and squirrels, which usually take them away before they can be picked. This is also an ideal solution to keep insects away from flowers

WARMING TIP - Please check the SIZE (8*10cm) and COLOR (white) before placing an order, and other colors are also optional in our store. Available in 3 Colors for your specific party theme: Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Wedding or anniversaries, etc
